drill: ED-n - edit/delete real-backend smoke: Telegram edited_message supersession, reply-targeted /delete tombstone, NOTE->DRAFT tombstone, operator-only audited hard-delete, and PG acceptance legs.

metadata.environment: real backend - STORAGE_BACKEND=postgres, migrations through 0010.note-chunk-lifecycle-state applied, EMBEDDING_BACKEND=openai, EMBEDDING_MODEL=text-embedding-3-large, EMBEDDING_DIMENSION=3072, CHAT_BACKEND=openai, CHAT_MODEL=gpt-4.1, CLASSIFIER_BACKEND=openai, CLASSIFIER_MODEL=gpt-4.1-mini, KNOWLEDGE_BACKEND=tavily; webhook secret set; MEMORY_RAG_PG_TEST_DSN used with a dedicated local memory_rag_test database for the PG acceptance legs
metadata.notes: Live operator evidence for the edit/delete milestone close. Credential-bearing values are redacted or represented only by presence. During this operator run, the first manual Telegram edit exposed that real Telegram edits arrive as edited_message; a narrow adapter correction was applied and validated before the live drill was rerun. The successful evidence below is from the rebuilt live runtime.

preflight_state.boot_log_line_shape: app.created env=<env> version=<version> embedding_backend=openai embedding_dim=3072 chat_backend=openai chat_model=gpt-4.1 classifier_backend=openai classifier_model=gpt-4.1-mini knowledge_backend=tavily
preflight_state.boot_log_line_verbatim: memory_rag_app  | 2026-06-15 23:22:05,655 INFO memory_rag.app :: app.created env=local version=0.0.0 embedding_backend=openai embedding_dim=3072 chat_backend=openai chat_model=gpt-4.1 classifier_backend=openai classifier_model=gpt-4.1-mini knowledge_backend=tavily
preflight_state.migrations_head: 0010.note-chunk-lifecycle-state applied; _yoyo_migration row count observed as 10; notes lifecycle_state/supersedes_note_id and event_chunks lifecycle_state/supersedes_chunk_id columns observed
preflight_state.boot_gate_notes: The app booted on the canonical real contour and /health returned {"status":"ok","version":"0.0.0","env":"local"} on both local and public health probes.

edit_round_trip.purpose: ED-2 (D-116): a Telegram edit of a captured /note supersedes the prior active revision, records lineage, re-embeds the new revision, and excludes the superseded revision from retrieval.

seed_note_request.url_shape: public Telegram webhook configured for the bot

edit_request.method: manual Telegram edit of the same message

retrieval_check_after_edit.answer_text_verbatim: The EDN manual was edited on 2026-06-16.

edit_round_trip.provider_attempt_log_line_verbatim: memory_rag_app  | 2026-06-15 23:24:32,154 INFO memory_rag.adapters.embeddings.openai_client :: provider.attempt label=openai.embeddings attempt=1/3 outcome=success latency_ms=253

delete_round_trip.purpose: ED-3 (D-117): reply-targeted /delete tombstones the active note + chunk, retains rows and authorship, and excludes tombstoned chunks from retrieval; NOTE->DRAFT edit-removal also tombstones the prior active note.

reply_targeted_delete_request.method: manual Telegram reply to the edited /note with /delete

delete_outcome.reply_text_verbatim: Deleted. That note is removed from search and won't appear in answers.

delete_round_trip.delete_log_line_verbatim: memory_rag_app  | 2026-06-15 23:27:32,900 INFO memory_rag.services.domain_service :: delete.tombstoned community_id=-1003818143464 note_id=622ee114-8362-49e8-a52c-195f3b8fa734 external_message_id=125

retrieval_check_after_delete.answer_text_verbatim: There is no evidence in the provided diary chunks of a manual edit to EDN on 2026-06-16. The entries for that date mention 'EDN rebuilt-runtime-probe edited 2711565811' and 'EDN live-runtime-probe seed 2701565471', but do not reference a manual edit to the EDN manual.

fail_closed_no_op_checks.delete_with_no_reply_target_reply_verbat: To delete a note, reply to it with /delete.
fail_closed_no_op_checks.delete_replying_to_non_note_reply_verbat: Nothing to delete — reply to a saved note with /delete to remove it.
fail_closed_no_op_checks.idempotent_second_delete: Nothing to delete — reply to a saved note with /delete to remove it.

note_to_draft_removal_sub_leg.purpose: Editing a captured /note to drop its /note command re-routes the edited delivery to DRAFT and tombstones the prior active note.
note_to_draft_removal_sub_leg.delete_log_line_verbatim: memory_rag_app  | 2026-06-15 23:31:00,444 INFO memory_rag.services.domain_service :: delete.tombstoned community_id=-1003818143464 note_id=a080e91f-52e3-4337-9e93-2536ae0e5e0e external_message_id=134

hard_delete.purpose: ED-3 (D-117): operator-only audited hard-delete physically removes the raw source aggregate and derived rows in FK-safe order, community-scoped, with an audit.hard_delete log record.
hard_delete.invocation: inline python snippet from RUNBOOK using Settings(), PostgresDomainStore(settings.postgres_dsn()), build_embedding_client(settings), DomainService(...), then svc.hard_delete_source_message(source_message_id, community_id=..., requested_by="operator")
hard_delete.audit_log_line_shape: audit.hard_delete community_id=<cid> requested_by=<who> source_message_id=<id> source_messages=<n> notes=<n> event_chunks=<n> embedding_records=<n> retrieval_hits=<n>
hard_delete.audit_log_line_verbatim: 2026-06-15 23:36:24,849 INFO memory_rag.services.domain_service :: audit.hard_delete community_id=-1003818143464 requested_by=operator source_message_id=436c3243-ed03-46c7-a90d-1b86b44173f4 source_messages=1 notes=1 event_chunks=1 embedding_records=1 retrieval_hits=0
hard_delete.fk_safe_order_observed: retrieval_hits -> embedding_records -> event_chunks -> notes -> source_messages completed with no FK violation; all post-delete count checks returned 0

pg_acceptance_legs.purpose: The ED-2/ED-3 Postgres acceptance legs were executed under a dedicated local MEMORY_RAG_PG_TEST_DSN pointing at memory_rag_test.
pg_acceptance_legs.command: MEMORY_RAG_PG_TEST_DSN=<REDACTED> uv run pytest tests/test_edit_supersession_ingest.py tests/test_delete_tombstone.py

out_of_scope_for_this_packet: A hard-delete operator CLI / control surface.
The /start and /help wording change to mention /delete.
Any live OpenAI call inside make check or any new gated test.
Any retrieval/answer-path behavior change beyond the existing edit/delete contract.

summary.verdict: green - ED-n live drill evidence complete and redaction-checkable
